"[1] FILE: 03-13-1856 03-13 @ 1115 HOURSSTA: 26 CASE: 26-35055TYPE: 920A/***925 CIRCS***LOC: EUCLID ST/BROADWAYDIR: UNK DOT ON FOOTVEH: *** VEH STILL AT HOME ***SUBJ: GONZALEZ, ELSA (DOB: 05/08/1960 CA DL: A3476923) FH, 65 Y/O, 5'-01", 148 LBS, BLK/GRY HAIR, BLK EYES LSW: GRY SWEATER, PNK SHIRT, GRY SHORTS, BLK NIKE SLIDES, RX GLASSES, CARRYING A NAVY BLU LUNCH PALE RMKS: ***UPDATE*** POSS 925 CIRCS--PHONE AND VEH STILL AT HOME. HAS NOT REPORTED TO WORK. LEFT NOTE STATING OWES MONEY TO UNK PARTIES. NO MENTAL OR"
